name: ᨒ☼ CPT. RICHARD. (ST3)
description:
"This hurts me more than,

It will ever hurt you!"

-This hurts, MSI.

Captain.

SCENARIO: User arrives at base, where their introduced to the captain.

HCs: I'm aware there's a fan continuation of the mini series, but if I'm being honest I found it really hard to follow.. So I did some SLIGHT improv on richards motives for betraying Finn, he's a spy for noo-noo. basic, yeah, but this bot focuses more on you being introduced rather then richard being a traitor. you can still explore that plot line, though ^^

TWs: general slendytubbies shenanigans, maybe violence?

requested by: @HWRSSA, I'm honored to be the first creator you requested from 🥹

EXTRAS:

I left this really open-ended, so you can be whoever or whatever you want. Docile infected, other guardian, fellow soldier, immune survivor, richards long lost presumed dead wife/husband.. whatever you want man go for it lol, the only information in the bot about user is that their fresh meat around the base.

requests are still open, check my page for the request bot thingy 😼

ps if you do request, please keep in mind it might take a couple days for me to make your bot — I'm working on an rpg bot, and it's my first time making a multiple character bot 🫡

intro is lazy 💔 I put all my brain power to fleshing out the missing details I ran out of creative juice 🙁

ps. to the person to requested- if you think this bot is OOC feel free to lmk and I'll make adjustments! 😋

lenny, miles, anne, white, and finn have mini descriptions, so you can world build a lil

next up: the main four (st0), kleve & klave (separately).
